name: TeamSpeak 3
author: ops@refx.example
description: TeamSpeak 3 voice server — low-latency VoIP for gaming communities. Slot-based: priced per simultaneous user.
longDescription: Host a TeamSpeak 3 voice server with crystal-clear, low-latency audio. Voice servers are billed per slot (simultaneous users) and run on lightweight resources compared to game servers. Connect on the assigned voice port shown in your panel. The purchased slot count is passed to the container as TS3SERVER_MAX_CLIENTS / SLOTS; the ServerQuery admin token (and privilege key) is printed to the console on first boot — TeamSpeak enforces the per-virtual-server slot cap via ServerQuery.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -e
# TeamSpeak ships in its Docker image; nothing to install on the volume.
mkdir -p /mnt/server
echo 'TeamSpeak 3 ready — accept the license and connect on the assigned voice port.'

variables.description: Set to 'accept' to agree to the TeamSpeak end-user license agreement (required to start).
Maximum simultaneous users. Set automatically from the slot count you purchase.
